---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest a capability HEAVEN should have
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem you're trying to solve

What part of a pen-test does HEAVEN make harder than it should be?

## Your proposed solution

What should HEAVEN do? Be specific — UI mockup, CLI flag spec, or
API schema preferred over hand-wavy descriptions.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds exist today? What other tools handle this and how?

## Scope check

- [ ] This is in scope for an offensive-security framework (not a SIEM,
      not a DLP, not a generic monitoring tool)
- [ ] This doesn't require shipping or bundling stolen / illegal data
- [ ] If destructive, this is gated by `--i-have-authorization`
- [ ] Doesn't break the existing public CLI/API surface

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can write the code
- [ ] I can write the tests
- [ ] I can write the docs
- [ ] I'm just opening this as a suggestion
